title: Memory timeline is now a first-class handoff report
summary: Kage now exposes kageMemoryTimeline, CLI kage timeline, MCP kage memory timeline, daemon /kage/timeline, local viewer reports/timeline.json, and dashboard/Memory timeline cards. It shows recently added, updated, pending,
body: Kage now exposes kageMemoryTimeline, CLI kage timeline, MCP kage_memory_timeline, daemon /kage/timeline, local viewer reports/timeline.json, and dashboard/Memory timeline cards. It shows recently added, updated, pending, and retired repo-memory packets so teammates can see what agents learned before handoff.
